name: Telegram Bot
description: Send messages, photos, and documents via the Telegram Bot API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Telegram Bot API integration. The bot token is passed directly in the URL path (e.g. /bot{YOUR_TOKEN}/sendMessage). No Authorization header is required. Obtain your token from @BotFather on Telegram.

bot_token.description: Your Telegram bot token obtained from @BotFather. This token is used in the URL path for all API requests.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a text message to a chat.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel.

text.description: Text of the message to be sent.

parse_mode.description: Mode for parsing entities: HTML or Markdown.

reply_markup.description: Additional interface options (inline keyboard, custom reply keyboard, etc.).

tools.name: send_photo
tools.description: Send a photo to a chat.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat.

photo.description: Photo to send — pass a file_id to resend a photo or an HTTP URL.

tools.name: send_document
tools.description: Send a document (file) to a chat.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat.

document.description: File to send — pass a file_id to resend or an HTTP URL.

tools.name: get_updates
tools.description: Receive incoming updates using long polling.

offset.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned.

limit.description: Limits the number of updates to be retrieved (1-100, default 100).

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for long polling (0 for short polling).

tools.name: get_bot_info
tools.description: Get basic information about the bot.

response.description: User object with basic bot info.

tools.name: forward_message
tools.description: Forward a message from one chat to another.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat.

from_chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the chat where the original message was sent.

message_id.description: Message identifier in the chat specified in from_chat_id.

tools.name: get_chat
tools.description: Get up-to-date information about a chat.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username.

tools.name: set_webhook
tools.description: Specify a URL to receive incoming updates via an outgoing webhook.

url.description: HTTPS URL to send updates to. Use an empty string to remove webhook integration.

max_connections.description: Maximum allowed number of simultaneous HTTPS connections to the webhook (1-100, default 40).

allowed_updates.description: List of the update types you want your bot to receive.
